creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=a70b25ff2f5451019085b6cd68f7aa2c05749d52

commit a70b25ff2f5451019085b6cd68f7aa2c05749d52
Author:     Michael Zhilin <mizhka@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-08-01 10:05:35 +0000
Commit:     Koichiro Iwao <meta@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-09-06 15:41:16 +0000

    devel/maven39: new port: version 3.9 of devel/maven

    java/eclipse requires Maven 3.9+ and actual version of devel/maven is 3.8.
    This patch adds devel/maven39 to manage this requirement.

    Changelog: https://maven.apache.org/docs/3.9.4/release-notes.html

    Co-authored-by: Michael Osipov <michaelo@apache.org>

    PR:             272863

 devel/Makefile                |  1 +
 devel/maven39/Makefile (new)  | 57 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 devel/maven39/distinfo (new)  |  3 ++
 devel/maven39/pkg-descr (new) |  3 ++
 devel/maven39/pkg-plist (new) | 85 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 5 files changed, 149 insertions(+)
